heading: Dissemination of resources for research institutions
label: 18935 Dissemination of resources for research institutions

children.heading: Dissemination of resources for research institutions
children.label: a Dissemination of resources for research institutions

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Not later than one year after , the Director shall, using the authorities of the Director under subsections (c)(15) and (e)(1)(A)(ix) of , disseminate and make publicly available tailored resources to help qualifying institutions identify, assess, manage, and reduce their cybersecurity risk related to conducting research.August 9, 2022section 272 of title 15

children.label: A
children.text: are generally applicable and usable by a wide range of qualifying institutions;

children.label: B
children.text: vary with the nature and size of the qualifying institutions, and the nature and sensitivity of the data collected or stored on the information systems or devices of the qualifying institutions;

children.label: C
children.text: include elements that promote awareness of simple, basic controls, a workplace cybersecurity culture, and third-party stakeholder relationships, to assist qualifying institutions in mitigating common cybersecurity risks;

children.label: D
children.text: include case studies, examples, and scenarios of practical application;

children.label: E
children.text: are outcomes-based and can be implemented using a variety of technologies that are commercial and off-the-shelf; and

children.label: F
children.text: to the extent practicable, are based on international technical standards.

children.heading: National cybersecurity awareness and education program
children.label: 3 National cybersecurity awareness and education program
children.text: The Director shall ensure that the resources disseminated under paragraph (1) are consistent with the efforts of the Director under .section 7443 of title 15

children.heading: Updates
children.label: 4 Updates
children.text: The Director shall review periodically and update the resources under paragraph (1) as the Director determines appropriate.

children.heading: Voluntary resources
children.label: 5 Voluntary resources
children.text: The use of the resources disseminated under paragraph (1) shall be considered voluntary.

children.heading: Other Federal cybersecurity requirements
children.label: b Other Federal cybersecurity requirements
children.text: Nothing in this section may be construed to supersede, alter, or otherwise affect any cybersecurity requirements applicable to Federal agencies.

children.heading: Qualifying institutions
children.label: 1 Qualifying institutions
children.text: The term “qualifying institutions” means institutions of higher education that are awarded in excess of $50,000,000 per year in total Federal research funding.

children.heading: Resources
children.label: 2 Resources
children.text: The term “resources” means guidelines, tools, best practices, technical standards, methodologies, and other ways of providing information.
